---
output: hugodown::md_document
title: "Flametree"
date: 2020-03-15
summary: '"Fractious petals, stop interrupting me with your boring beauty." (Jennifer Chang)'
trailer: "gallery/flametree/preview/001_flametree_20_13.png"
---

```{r include=FALSE}
source("../../diziet.R")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
diziet$make_gallery()
```
